title: Update the Automations on multible boards?
excerpt:
We have a lot of boards with Automations. 
We are developing Monday and on the go. 
If I want to add or adjust an automation, I need to go to every (±100) board to update the automations. 
Is there a way I can update the…

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a lot of boards with Automations.
We are developing Monday and on the go.

If I want to add or adjust an automation, I need to go to every (±100) board to update the automations.

Is there a way I can update the automations on all boards?

posts.author: tpalongi (Thomas Alongi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to see an answer to this, too!

Tom

posts.author: LegalPM (Wanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I have also requested the ability to do global automations before. This is very important to us.

posts.author: zwalters (Zac Walters)
posts.cookedHtml: This would also benefit our Monday.com as we have several boards that are duplicates but used for different departments. Looking forward to seeing the answer!

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree with all of you and have the same question.

posts.author: EmilyRobin (Emily Rademacher)
posts.cookedHtml: I have wished for the ability to add the same automations to multiple boards at once. What a time saver! I’d also love the ability to customize statuses that become universal and can be added to multiple boards.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml: @Jappa , Will the automations be same across all the boards?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml:
@aquibk yes, that is exactly what I want. Even better would it be to update an automation, and the updated automation would be across all boards.

Now if I decide to change, delete or add an automation. I need to repeat that on ±85 boards…

posts.author: Ozi (Oz Israel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Emily,
For the second part of your question try to use “Column Templates” feature, which allows you to create a status column with your universal statuses and then use this column in any board just by adding the column from the template section. Here’s an article about that feature:https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/4405213200018-Column-templates
Nevertheless, keep in mind that this feature is available only to enterprise plan ( ).
Oz.

posts.author: EmilyRobin (Emily Rademacher)
posts.cookedHtml: Oz, this is helpful. Thanks for letting me know.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml: This is not possible at this point of time, however it is a good feature we can think of in coming future.

posts.author: EmilyRobin (Emily Rademacher)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve looked into it and unfortunately this is not included on our plan.

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: No update or follow up…

posts.author: Giulyanna (Giulyanna Loureiro)
posts.cookedHtml: I just started using Monday.com and found the need for this too.

posts.author: agarnto (Angela Garnto)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be awesome if this feature could be a priority to add. We have over 300 boards with 24+ automations per board and if I make a change to one that would benefit all I have to manually add/change each board.

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Here you can vote: Set Board as MASTER Board (Column Structure, Permissions, and Automations Applied Across Linked Boards)
